note: One-time read-only scan of every distinct HTTPS origin host behind an in-area rental below 15,000 kr. (rental section) or cooperative-sale row (Andelsbolig sections). akutbolig.dk was the sole rental-section origin, but a live probe of its category pages (e.g. https://www.akutbolig.dk/koebenhavn-v) found no server-rendered '/vis/{id}' markup and a 404 on the direct listing URL: the site now appears to be a client-rendered app, so the previously-assumed static-HTML extractor does not work against it and it is not registered as verified. See docs/latest-source-scan.md.
